title: viola × regeliana
intro: Viola × regeliana, also known as the hybrid pansy or pansy viola, is a plant species that belongs to the family Violaceae and is a cross between Viola tricolor and Viola altaica. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × regeliana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
